## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy performance and next steps for ramping up AI security content.](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content performance showing positive indicators** - Recent articles are climbing in impressions and two new pieces made the top 10 with double-digit views](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Strategic pivot to AI security** - Aembit plans to launch AI solutions starting next month and wants content to position them as an authority in AI security (with identity as one component)](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Volume target of 5 articles/week** - Currently have 3 articles ready to publish, 2 approved outlines, and 14 approved topics in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Process improvement** - Adding thesis statements to outlines to improve feedback efficiency and content alignment](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Impressions showing strong upward climb since January through September 13](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Weekly clicks holding steady but flat (25-43 per week) - need to increase](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Views increased to 405 (up from \~350-360), with consistent active users and time-on-page metrics](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Two recently published articles made the top 10 organic traffic list: "Cloud Posture Tools" and "Securing AI Agents Without Secrets"](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Currently tracking \~1,200-1,300 events weekly in GA4, but minimal website interactions and demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Content Production Status

  - [Current pipeline: 3 articles approved and ready to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [2 outlines approved that can be immediately turned into articles](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [14 approved topics that will be sent in batches of 5 for outline approval](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Adding thesis statements to outlines to streamline the review process and clarify main arguments](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [GrowthX implementing agentic-based workflows to improve first draft quality](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Strategic Direction for AI Security Content

  - [Aembit plans to launch initial AI solution as early as next month, with increasingly sophisticated launches through year-end](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Planning an AI security and non-human identities conference for January](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Content focus shifting to broader AI security landscape (with identity as one pillar) to position Aembit as an authoritative source](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Two key content areas to develop:](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
    1.  AI security broadly (going "mile wide, foot deep" generally but "10 feet deep" in identity/access)
    2.  MCP (Managed Compute Platform) security as a rich topic area related to securing AI agent access
  - [Target audience evolving to include both CISO teams and emerging "AI centers of excellence" within organizations](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

### Relationship Assessment

  - [Apurva recapped feedback shared with Marcel: technical quality issues, need for GrowthX to drive strategy rather than Aembit, and uncertainty about feedback incorporation](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Contract structured as "six months, six months with an out" - creates urgency to demonstrate real results that can be extrapolated](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Need to develop a mutually understood feedback loop to ensure system improvement](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to integrate agentic-based workflows to improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Etisham to publish 3 approved articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Add thesis statements to all future outlines for more efficient feedback](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop deeper topic research around AI security and MCP security](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Explore AI security landscape to identify valuable topic areas while maintaining focus on identity aspects](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Aim to scale up to 5 articles per week with improved quality and strategic alignment](https://fathom.video/share/dyUsGyS-yY8TSvvnZi8midury912Uih7?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
